Proceed?","header":"Restart engine","options":[{"label":"Yes, restart containerd+docker now","description":"I run sudo systemctl restart containerd docker on 100.80.49.10. All containers bounce and auto-recover (restart=unless-stopped). Then I verify the fleet is back, redeploy frita-executor if needed, and re-run the end-to-end minion test."},{"label":"I'll restart it myself","description":"You run the restart at the keyboard so you can watch the fleet recover. Tell me when it's back and I'll verify + redeploy + test."},{"label":"Hold off for now","description":"Don't bounce the live fleet yet. Leave the real container fixed and everything documented; finish the orphan cleanup later during a maintenance window."}],"multiSelect":false}]
